title: マヤノ的ファッション会議！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out shopping...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Awww, this is so cute! ♪ It's probably too
grown-up for me though... But maybe that
contrast would make me look cute!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hm, what to do... Aha! You there! Join me in my
indecision!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yup! There's a sale on right now, and I'm trying to
buy as many cute clothes as I can! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, I dunno what to get. I'm on a tight
budget this month!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This fit is super trendy! It's like... BAM! Look at
me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: This one's cute and comfy. The shop lady said it's the peak of functional beauty!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Which one do you think I look better in?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I totally agree! I've gotta be the latest and
greatest! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! A little help, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I can learn something from Mayano Top
Gun's drive to always be ahead of the pack.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's such a good choice! The comfier the
clothes, the more energy I have to play and enjoy
myself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally going with this one! Lemme go pay for
it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Excuse meee! I'd like to buy this, please!
